arts.ttl: Arne Slot tells his Liverpool players to be proud of 'almost impossible' club record-breaking start as the Reds' stunning start to the season continues
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez's 27th-minute goal was enough to win in Saxony, a victory that makes this Liverpool side the first to win their first six away games of a season.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains decision to substitute Mohamed Salah early in the second-half during win over RB Leipzig... despite Egyptian getting assist for Darwin Nunez's goal
arts.sum: Despite getting the assist for Darwin Nunez 's strike in the first-half, the Egyptian had a relatively quiet evening at the Red Bull Arena.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals pre-match Darwin Nunez chat as striker repays boss's faith
arts.sum: Arne Slot wanted to see Darwin Nunez return to the scoresheet and the Uruguayan delivered as he tapped home the only goal as Liverpool kept up their perfect record

arts.ttl: Slot praises 'dominant' Liverpool win over Leipzig
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot praises his side's performance after Liverpool secured a 1-0 win at RB Leipzig on match week three of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot proud of Liverpool’s record-breaking achievements
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez’s 27th-minute goal was enough to see off Leipzig in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez seals Liverpool record as Arne Slot can't hide Arsenal plans
arts.sum: RB LEIPZIG 0-1 LIVERPOOL: Arne Slot's side edged a close encounter in Germany to extend their impressive start to the season as Mohamed Salah was even given a breather towards the finish with Arsenal on the horizon

arts.ttl: Football Governance Bill to include parachute payments as Everton and Liverpool watch on
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Jamie Gardner PA Chief Sports Reporter, Bruna Reis)
arts.sum: Chairman of the EFL Rick Parry has been a vocal critic of the impact parachute payments have on the Championship

arts.ttl: Liverpool ratings: Núñez, Salah shines in win over Leipzig
arts.sum: Darwin Núñez scored the opener after adding the finishing touch to Mohamed Salah's header in the 27th minute as the Reds took control of the match from that point, almost doubling their advantage through Virgil van Dijk, whose header from a corner was saved by former Liverpool goalkeeper Péter Gulácsi . His decision to take Salah off was an astute one given the importance of the next match, and he also ensured Andy Robertson and Curtis Jones got some minutes to continue their recent form.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes 'very fortunate' claim as Liverpool boss explains Mohamed Salah substitution
arts.sum: Reds continue perfect Champions League record with win over RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Slot machine: Liverpool makes record-setting start to season under Dutchman after win at Leipzig
arts.sum: Liverpool’s relentless start to the season under new manager Arne Slot is seeing the team pump out record after record, and the scene of its latest win felt poignant. Liverpool ground out a 1-0 victory in the Champions League on Wednesday at Leipzig, one of the clubs that Jurgen Klopp — who recently left the Reds after nearly nine years as its popular manager — will soon be overseeing in his new role as head of global soccer at Red Bull.
